metadata.description: A meeting room for Claude Code. Five AI personas debate your question, the Boss synthesizes, you push back until satisfied.

plugins.name: meeting-bots
plugins.description: AI personas (Boss, Pusher, Rookie, Watcher, Cynic) debate your question. 3 to 10 participants, mix teams (dev, design, product, business, life), add custom personas on the fly. Full debate recorded to a markdown file.
